productDisplayName: UCB Men's Polo Neck With Big Ben Logo Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed collar and velvetty in-seam, buttoned rugged chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, vented hem and embroidered Big Ben logo on left chestFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not bleach Do not dry clean Do not dry in direct sunlight Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Subtle and stylish, this black polo neck t-shirt from the united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The rugged placket on the chest coupled with the thickly embroidered Big Ben logo on the left chest enhances your regal style. The ribbed sleeve hems contour your well-toned arms perfectly, while the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
